what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG outline icon that draws an at-mention symbol using a central circle and an enclosing path stroke.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with no fixed width or height.
The icon has fill="none" and stroke="currentColor".
Stroke styling is set to stroke-width="1.5", stroke-linecap="round", and stroke-linejoin="round".
The geometry consists of one circle centered at 12,12 with radius 3 and one path forming the outer @-like curve.
standouts: The icon inherits color from currentColor.
The at-mention shape is built from only two SVG elements.
conventions: Uses inline SVG attributes for an outline icon.
Uses rounded line caps and joins.
Keeps presentation color external through currentColor.
notes: A compact file-local SVG asset for an at-mention outline icon.
questions: Is stroke-width="1.5" the intended weight for this icon set?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename/path indicate an at-mention icon, and the SVG content draws an at-sign-like outline mark.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable at-mention UI glyph that can adapt to surrounding text or icon color.
contribution: Provides a reusable currentColor at-mention glyph substrate with a central target circle and surrounding @-style stroke path.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG outline icon representing an at-mention symbol with one circle and one path.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a themeable at-mention icon asset in an SVG icon set.
